boundary_binding.action_boundary: May facilities allow contractor site work to begin?

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records show END-IRI-089 endorsement pending CE-12 and WARN-IRI-089 requires separate insurance-status verification. STD-IRI-089-P demands full authority match on contractor, site, coverage, date, and status class before start. Boundary remains open; escalate for resolution.
